reviews.comment:
Cola de 2 horas para cargar combustible

(Translated by Google)
2-hour queue to refuel
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1bWRESDNRRRAB

reviews.comment:
El personal muy amable. Pero más de 24 sin combustible y luego hacer una cola de más de una.hora para poder cargar. Son temas que la petrolera debe resolver en forma urgente

(Translated by Google)
The staff was very friendly. But they had to wait more than 24 hours without fuel, then wait in line for more than an hour to fill up. These are issues the oil company needs to resolve urgently.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1eVliemZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Nunca hay combustible, cuando hay, la gente se cola en la fila y las motos ni hablar, hay 2 surtidores solo para motos y vienen todos con bidones a cargar.
Mas de 2 hs de demora para cargar.

(Translated by Google)
There's never any fuel. When there is, people cut in line, and motorcycles are even worse. There are only two pumps for motorcycles, and they all come with jerrycans to fill up. The wait to fill up is over two hours.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1dFB1LU1REAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente la atención en el ACA Puerto Iguazú, de María SEGOVIA.
Una persona muy cálida y cordial.
El local del ServiCompras estaba reluciente y los baños más limpios que los de mi casa.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service at the ACA Puerto Iguazú, by María Segovia.
A very warm and friendly person.
The ServiCompras store was spotless, and the bathrooms were cleaner than the ones in my house.
